signup.a: You can sign up with your email or quickly register using Google or Kakao accounts. Apple Sign-In is also available on iOS. Social login doesn't require a separate password.

createTrip.q: How do I create a trip plan?
createTrip.a: Tap 'Create New Trip' on the home screen, enter your destination and travel dates, and AI will automatically generate a personalized itinerary. Select your budget, travel style, and interests for more accurate recommendations.

aiPlan.q: How does the AI itinerary work?
aiPlan.a: We use advanced AI technology to analyze popular attractions, restaurants, and cultural experiences at your destination, then create an optimized schedule considering travel routes and timing. Generated itineraries can be freely modified.

appTour.a: The app has five main tabs: Home (trip list), Discover (find other travelers), Trip Detail (itinerary, map, weather, budget), Notifications, and Profile. Navigate easily using the bottom tab bar.

editPlan.q: How do I edit my itinerary?
editPlan.a: Tap any activity in the trip detail screen to edit its time, location, and notes. Drag and drop to reorder activities, or use the + button to add new ones.

tripStatus.q: Do editing rules differ by trip status?
tripStatus.a:
• Before trip: Freely modify and add to all plans.
• During trip: Past activities can't be changed; only upcoming ones can be edited.
• After trip: View and delete only; no modifications allowed.

mapView.q: How do I view places on the map?
mapView.a: In the trip detail screen, switch to the map tab to see all planned locations at a glance. Tap markers for activity details.

weather.q: Where can I see weather and time zone info?
weather.a: Local weather and time zone information appears automatically at the top of the trip detail screen for each day. Weather data comes from external services and updates in real-time.

socialFeatures.q: How do I use social features?
socialFeatures.a: Browse other travelers' shared plans in the Discover tab. Follow travelers you like and give likes to their trip plans. To share your own trip, tap the share button in the trip detail screen.

collaborators.q: How do I plan a trip with others?
collaborators.a: In the trip detail screen, go to the 'Collaborators' section and invite others by email. Invitees can join as 'Viewer' or 'Editor'.

linkSharing.q: How do I share a trip via link?
linkSharing.a: Tap the share button in the trip detail screen to generate a unique share link. Anyone with the link can view your trip plan. You can disable sharing anytime and set an expiration period (7/30/90 days).

photos.q: How do I manage trip photos?
photos.a: You can change the cover photo in the trip detail screen or add photos to individual activities. Uploaded photos are automatically optimized (converted to WebP) for storage.

budget.q: How do I manage my budget and expenses?
budget.a: Set your total budget when creating a trip. In the trip detail screen's budget tab, track expenses by category (transport, accommodation, food, attractions, etc.). View daily averages and remaining budget at a glance.

editProfile.q: How do I edit my profile?
editProfile.a: Go to Profile tab → 'Edit Profile' to change your name and photo.

changePassword.q: How do I change my password?
changePassword.a: Go to Profile tab → 'Change Password', enter your current password, and set a new one. Social login users don't need to change passwords.

twoFactor.q: How do I set up two-factor authentication?
twoFactor.a: Go to Profile tab → 'Two-Factor Authentication' to enable it. Scan the QR code with a TOTP app like Google Authenticator and enter the verification code. Backup codes will also be provided.

notifications.a: Go to Profile tab → 'Notification Settings' to configure push notifications. You can receive departure reminders, trip start/completion alerts.

deleteAccount.q: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.a: Tap 'Delete Account' at the bottom of the Profile tab. All data will be permanently deleted within 30 days of the request. This action cannot be undone.

gdprExport.q: How do I export my data?
gdprExport.a: Go to Profile → Settings and tap 'Export Data' to download all your personal data (account info, trips, expenses, notifications) in JSON format. This ensures your right to data portability under GDPR.

darkMode.q: How do I enable dark mode?
darkMode.a: Toggle the dark mode switch in the Profile tab. Dark mode reduces eye strain in low-light environments and helps save battery.

language.q: How do I change the app language?
language.a: Go to Profile tab → 'Language' and choose from 17 languages (Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, German, French, Thai, Vietnamese, Portuguese, Arabic, Indonesian, Hindi, Italian, Russian, Turkish, Malay).

offlineUse.q: Can I use the app offline?
offlineUse.a: Yes, previously loaded trip plans can be viewed without internet. Changes made offline will automatically sync when you reconnect.

syncStatus.q: How do I check sync status?
syncStatus.a: A sync banner appears at the top of the screen: 'Pending (N items)' → 'Syncing...' → 'Synced'. Auto-retry occurs on unstable connections.

syncError.a: Check your network connection and restart the app. If the issue persists, contact us through 'Contact Us'.

freeService.q: Is there a fee to use the service?
freeService.a: MyTravel is free to use with up to 3 AI trip generations per month. Premium subscription ($3.99/month or $29.99/year) unlocks 30 AI generations per month, ad-free experience, and enhanced features. Free users will see ads to support service operations.

adInfo.a: Interstitial ads may appear after trip creation, and banner ads may be shown on some screens. Personalized ads are controlled through iOS App Tracking Transparency (ATT).

affiliates.a: We may provide booking links for hotels and activities in the trip detail screen. Partner services and availability may vary.

premium.a: Premium ($3.99/month or $29.99/year) gives you 30 AI trip generations per month, ad-free experience, and enhanced features. Free users can create up to 3 AI trips per month. You can cancel anytime, and your plan will revert to free at the end of the billing period.

premiumCancel.a: Cancel directly from your App Store or Google Play subscription management. You'll continue to enjoy Premium features until the end of your current billing period. Refund policies follow each app store's terms.

premiumRestore.q: How do I restore my subscription?
premiumRestore.a: Go to Profile → Subscription and tap 'Restore Purchases'. Your previous subscription will be automatically restored. When switching devices, sign in with the same Apple ID or Google account.

contact.emailDescription: If the FAQ above doesn't resolve your issue, please contact us via email. Device info and app version will be included automatically.

art1.title: Article 1 (Purpose)
art1.content: These Terms of Service govern the use of MyTravel ("Service"), including the rights, obligations, and responsibilities of both the company and users.

art2.title: Article 2 (Definitions)
art2.content:
① "Service" refers to the automatic travel planning and management service provided by MyTravel.
② "Member" refers to a person who has agreed to these Terms and registered for the Service.
③ "AI-Generated Content" refers to travel itineraries and recommendations automatically generated using artificial intelligence.
④ "Travel Data" refers to destinations, schedules, and activity plans entered by members.
⑤ "Premium Subscription" refers to the paid service tier that provides enhanced features.

art3.title: Article 3 (Service Description)
art3.content:
The Service provides:
• AI-powered automatic travel plan generation
• Travel plan editing, adding, and deletion management
• Local weather and time zone information
• Travel progress tracking
• Past travel history viewing
• Offline itinerary access and sync
• Budget management and expense tracking
• Trip photo upload and management
• Social features (trip discovery, follow, likes)
• Trip sharing (link-based sharing, collaborator invitations)
• Premium subscription (30 AI generations/month, ad-free)
• Multi-language support (17 languages)
• Notification services

art4.title: Article 4 (Account Registration)
art4.content:
① You may register via email or social accounts (Google, Apple, Kakao).
② Users under 14 years of age cannot use the Service.
③ You must provide accurate information. You are responsible for any issues from inaccurate information.
④ You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account.

art5.title: Article 5 (Service Usage Rules)
art5.content:
① Before trip: Plans can be freely modified and extended.
② During trip: Completed activities cannot be changed; only upcoming activities can be modified.
③ After trip: History can only be viewed or deleted, not modified.
④ AI-generated results are for reference only. Users should verify local conditions when traveling.

art6.title: Article 6 (AI Service Terms)
art6.content:
① The accuracy, safety, and suitability of AI-generated travel plans are not guaranteed.
② Data is processed through the OpenAI API for itinerary generation, as described in our Privacy Policy.
③ User-entered travel data is not used for AI model training.
④ AI services may be temporarily limited due to technical circumstances.
⑤ Free users are limited to 3 AI trip generations per month; Premium subscribers can use up to 30 generations per month.

art7.title: Article 7 (Prohibited Activities)
art7.content:
Users must not:
• Interfere with the normal operation of the Service
• Violate other users' privacy
• Access the Service through automated means at scale
• Fraudulently click or manipulate advertisements
• Reverse-engineer, copy, or imitate the Service
• Share inappropriate content through shared trip plans
• Violate any applicable laws or regulations

art8.title: Article 8 (Advertising and Affiliates)
art8.content:
② Responsibility for ad content lies with the respective advertisers.
④ Premium subscribers do not see advertisements.

art9.title: Article 9 (Premium Subscription)
art9.content:
① Premium subscription is available as monthly ($3.99/month) or annual ($29.99/year) plans.
② Premium provides monthly 30 AI trip generations, ad removal, and enhanced features.
③ Subscriptions auto-renew on the billing date. Cancel at least 24 hours before renewal to avoid charges.
④ Cancellation is managed through Apple App Store or Google Play Store subscription settings.
⑤ After cancellation, Premium features remain available until the end of the current billing period.
⑥ Refund policies follow Apple and Google's respective app store policies.
⑦ Payments are processed through RevenueCat. Credit card information is not stored directly by the Service.

art10.title: Article 10 (User Content and Sharing)
art10.content:
① Rights to user-created content (trip plans, photos, reviews) belong to the user.
② When you set a trip to 'public' or generate a share link, the content becomes visible to others.
③ The Service has a non-exclusive license to use publicly shared content within the scope necessary for service operation.
④ Users must not share inappropriate or illegal content (violence, adult material, discriminatory content, etc.).
⑤ The Service may remove or hide content that violates operational policies without prior notice.
⑥ Uploaded photos are optimized on the server (resizing, WebP conversion). Original files are not retained.

art11.title: Article 11 (Intellectual Property)
art11.content:
① IP rights for the Service's content, design, and software belong to the Service provider.
② Rights to travel plans created by users belong to the users.

art12.title: Article 12 (Disclaimers)
art12.content:
① AI-generated travel plans are for reference only. Verify local conditions when traveling.
② Weather and time zone info is based on external APIs; accuracy is not guaranteed.
③ The Service is not liable for interruptions due to force majeure or system failures.
④ The Service acts only as an intermediary for affiliate bookings and bears no direct liability.

art13.title: Article 13 (Account Termination)
art13.content:
① You may terminate your account anytime through the 'Delete Account' feature.
② All personal data will be permanently deleted within 30 days.
③ Information required by law will be retained for the specified period then destroyed.
④ If you have an active Premium subscription, cancel it through the app store before deleting your account.

art14.title: Article 14 (Liability)
art14.content: If a member suffers damages due to the company's intentional or gross negligence, the company shall compensate in accordance with applicable laws.

art15.title: Article 15 (Changes to Terms)
art15.content:
① Changes will be notified at least 7 days before taking effect via in-app notices.
② If you disagree with changes, you may discontinue use and delete your account.

art16.title: Article 16 (Dispute Resolution)
art16.content:
① These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea.
② Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the Seoul Central District Court.

art17.title: Article 17 (Addendum)
art17.content: These Terms are effective from April 26, 2026.

art18.title: Service Provider
art18.content:
• Company name: AI Soft
• Representative: Hoon-jae Park
• Inquiry email: longpapa82@gmail.com
• Business registration number: In progress — will be updated before official commercial launch

art1.title: 1. Information We Collect
art1.content:
[Required]
• Account info: Name, email address, profile photo
• Social login: Public profile from Google, Apple, or Kakao

[Optional]
• Travel preferences: Budget level, travel style, interests
• Photos: Trip cover photos, activity photos (converted to WebP on upload)

[Automatic]
• Device info: Device type, OS, app version, push notification token
• Usage data: App usage patterns, ad interactions, analytics events
• Travel data: Destinations, schedules, activity plans, location coordinates
• Security data: Audit logs (login, password changes, and other security events, IP addresses)
• Subscription data: Subscription tier, platform, expiry date, monthly AI usage count
• Social data: Follow relationships, likes, share tokens

[Methods] Registration, social login, automatic collection during use

art2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
art2.content:
• Service delivery: Account management, AI travel plan generation, local info
• AI processing: Itinerary generation via OpenAI API (destination, dates, preferences sent)
• Personalization: Optimizing recommendations based on travel preferences
• Advertising: Personalized ads (with separate consent)
• Improvement: Usage analysis, bug fixing
• Subscription management: Premium status verification, feature access control
• Security: Abnormal access detection, audit logging

art3.title: 3. Third-Party Sharing
art3.content:
We do not share personal info except:

| Recipient | Data | Purpose |
| OpenAI | Destination, dates, preferences | AI itinerary generation |
| Google (AdSense/AdMob) | Ad ID, usage patterns | Ad delivery |
| RevenueCat | App user ID, subscription info | Subscription payment processing |
| Google Maps API | Search queries, session tokens | Place search |
| OpenWeather API | Latitude, longitude coordinates | Weather information |
| Sentry | Error data, user context | Error monitoring |
| Mapbox | Search queries | Place search |
| LocationIQ | Search queries | Geocoding |
| Expo | Push token, device info | Push notifications |
| App Store / Google Play | Purchase data | In-app purchase processing |

※ With explicit user consent
※ When required by law

art4.title: 4. Data Processing Delegation
art4.content:
| Provider | Service |
| Cloud services (Hetzner Cloud, Helsinki, Finland) | Data storage and processing |
| Email service | Authentication and notification emails |
| RevenueCat | Subscription payment management |

art5.title: 5. Data Retention
art5.content:
• Account deletion: Destroyed within 30 days
• E-commerce law: Transaction records retained for 5 years
• Telecom law: Access logs retained for 3 months
• Audit logs: Retained for 30 days then automatically deleted
• Information required by law is stored separately for the required period then destroyed.
• Error logs (including user email, device model, action breadcrumbs): retained for 90 days, then automatically deleted

art6.title: 6. Your Rights
art6.content:
You may exercise the following rights:
• Access, correct, delete, or suspend processing of your personal info
• Request data portability (Article 35-2 of the Privacy Act)
• Request explanation of or refuse automated decisions (AI itinerary generation)
• Permanently delete all data by deleting your account
• Withdraw ad tracking consent (changeable in device settings)

[Data Export Scope]
Included in data export: User profile, trip plans, expense records, notification history.
Not included: Social relationships (follows), uploaded photos, analytics events, audit logs.

[How to exercise]
App: Profile → Delete Account
Email: longpapa82@gmail.com

art7.title: 7. Protection of Children Under 14
art7.content: This Service restricts registration for children under 14. If we become aware that a child's data has been collected, we will delete it without delay.

art8.title: 8. Data Destruction
art8.content:
• Electronic files: Permanently deleted using irrecoverable methods
• Printouts: Shredded or incinerated
• Uploaded photos: Permanently deleted from server upon account deletion
• Destroyed promptly when retention period expires or purpose is fulfilled.

art9.title: 9. Advertising and Behavioral Data
art9.content:
• iOS: Control personalized ads via App Tracking Transparency (ATT).
• Android: Reset ad ID or opt out via Settings → Google → Ads.
• Web: Disable cookies in browser settings (some features may be limited).
• Authentication tokens (JWT) are stored in secure storage for session management.

art10.title: 10. Security Measures
art10.content:
• Password encryption (bcrypt, 12 rounds)
• SSL/TLS communication encryption (HSTS enabled)
• Access control and two-factor authentication (TOTP)
• Regular security audits and monitoring
• Account lockout (15-minute lock after 10 failed attempts)
• Sensitive data masking (PII filtering in logs)
• Audit logging (security events retained for 30 days)

art11.title: 11. Privacy Officer
art11.content:
Privacy Officer: MyTravel Operations Team
Email: longpapa82@gmail.com

art12.title: 12. Cross-Border Data Transfer
art12.content:
Your personal information may be transferred outside of Korea for service operation:

| Recipient | Location | Data | Purpose |
| OpenAI | USA | Travel data | AI itinerary generation |
| Google | USA | Ad ID, usage patterns | Ad delivery |
| RevenueCat | USA | Subscription info | Payment processing |
| Sentry | Germany | Error data | Error monitoring |

| OpenWeather | United States | Latitude/longitude coordinates | Weather information |
Each service maintains appropriate data protection measures, and transfers are made with user consent in accordance with applicable laws.

art13.title: 13. Data Breach Notification
art13.content:
In the event of a data breach, we will promptly notify affected users of:
• Categories of personal information breached
• Timing and circumstances of the breach
• Recommended actions to minimize potential harm
• Our response measures and remediation procedures
• Contact information for the responsible department

Notification will be made via email, in-app notices, or other appropriate means.

art14.title: 14. Policy Changes
art14.content:
Changes will be notified at least 7 days before taking effect via in-app notices.

This policy is effective from April 26, 2026.

ccpa.title: CCPA Consumer Rights (California)
ccpa.content:
Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA / CPRA), users residing in California have the following rights:
• Right to know (§ 1798.100): know the categories of personal information collected
• Right to delete (§ 1798.105): request deletion of personal information
• Right of access (§ 1798.110): request a copy of your data
• Right to opt-out of sale (§ 1798.120): MyTravel does not sell personal information
• Non-discrimination (§ 1798.125): users are not discriminated against for exercising their rights

To exercise these rights, contact us at longpapa82@gmail.com
